spec.description: Sigil eval results — striking gradient visuals over the past 24 hours. Built on real Prom data only (LLM-judge sub-metrics filtered out).

spec.title: Total Evals (24h)
spec.description: Total evaluations executed in the selected range

spec.expr: sum(increase(sigil_eval_executions_total{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range]))

spec.title: Pass Rate · by Agent
spec.description: Higher = better. Color scales yellow (poor) → blue (great).

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (gen_ai_agent_name) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed="true", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) / sum by (gen_ai_agent_name) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed=~"true|false", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) * 100)

spec.title: Fail Rate · by Model
spec.description: LLM model failure ranking over the full range — worst performers first

spec.expr: sort_desc((1 - sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed="true", gen_ai_request_model!="", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) / sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed=~"true|false", gen_ai_request_model!="", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range]))) * 100 > 0)

spec.title: Pass Rate · by Evaluator
spec.description: Which specific checks pass most often

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (evaluator) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed="true", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) / sum by (evaluator) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed=~"true|false", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) * 100)

spec.title: Pass Rate (24h)
spec.description: Overall pass percentage on the selected range

spec.expr: sum(increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed="true", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) / sum(increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed=~"true|false", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) * 100

spec.title: Eval Volume per Hour — by Agent
spec.description: Stacked area — executions per hour, broken down by agent. Showcases load shape over 24h.

spec.expr: sum by (agent_group) (label_replace(rate(sigil_eval_executions_total{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__rate_interval]), "agent_group", "$1", "gen_ai_agent_name", "^(sb|nc).*")) * 3600

spec.title: Pass Rate Over Time — by Model
spec.description: Quality trend per model — sustained dips reveal model regressions

spec.expr: sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (rate(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed="true", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (rate(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed=~"true|false", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

spec.title: Failed Executions (24h)
spec.description: Execution errors — failures unrelated to the score itself

spec.expr: sum(increase(sigil_eval_executions_total{status="failed", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range]))

spec.title: Pass Rate — Agent × Score Key
spec.description: Pass rate per (agent, score_key) combo — gradient yellow→blue.

spec.expr: bottomk(25, (sum by (gen_ai_agent_name, score_key) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed="true", gen_ai_agent_name!="", score_key!="", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) / sum by (gen_ai_agent_name, score_key) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed=~"true|false", gen_ai_agent_name!="", score_key!="", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) * 100) > 0)

spec.title: Pass vs Fail by Evaluator Kind
spec.description: How much of each evaluator kind passed vs failed

spec.expr: sum by (evaluator_kind, passed) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range]))

spec.title: Avg Eval Duration
spec.description: Mean time spent per eval execution

spec.expr: sum(increase(sigil_eval_duration_seconds_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range])) / sum(increase(sigil_eval_duration_seconds_count{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range]))

spec.title: Score-Key Pass Rate — Ranked
spec.description: Which eval criteria pass most

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (score_key) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed="true", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) / sum by (score_key) (increase(sigil_eval_scores_total{passed=~"true|false", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind", score_key=~"$score_key"}[$__range])) * 100)

spec.title: Eval Volume by Agent
spec.description: Share of evals each agent produced

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (gen_ai_agent_name) (increase(sigil_eval_executions_total{gen_ai_agent_name!="", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range])))

spec.title: Eval Volume by Model
spec.description: Share of evals run per LLM model

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (increase(sigil_eval_executions_total{gen_ai_request_model!="", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range])))

spec.title: Active Agents
spec.description: Distinct agents producing eval traffic

spec.expr: count(count by (gen_ai_agent_name) (sigil_eval_scores_total{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}))

spec.title: Avg Eval Duration · by Model
spec.description: Slowest evaluators surface first — investigate timeouts

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (increase(sigil_eval_duration_seconds_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range])) / sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (increase(sigil_eval_duration_seconds_count{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range])))

spec.title: Avg Eval Duration Over Time — by Evaluator Kind
spec.description: Heuristic should be near-zero; llm_judge dominates duration

spec.expr: sum by (evaluator_kind) (rate(sigil_eval_duration_seconds_sum{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (evaluator_kind) (rate(sigil_eval_duration_seconds_count{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.title: Eval Queue Depth (Total)
spec.description: Total queued evaluations across all statuses — millions = backlog

spec.expr: sum(sigil_eval_queue_depth)

spec.title: AI Revenue per Hour — by Model
spec.description: USD/hour of AI-attributed revenue, by model

spec.expr: sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (rate(neoncart_ai_attributed_revenue_usd_total{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model"}[$__rate_interval])) * 3600

spec.title: Revenue by Source
spec.description: ai_chatbot vs ai_gift_finder revenue share

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (source) (increase(neoncart_ai_attributed_revenue_usd_total[$__range])))

spec.title: Eval Volume · Agent × Model
spec.description: Top agent-model combos by traffic — discover routing patterns

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (gen_ai_agent_name, gen_ai_request_model) (increase(sigil_eval_executions_total{gen_ai_agent_name!="", gen_ai_request_model!="", gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range])))

spec.title: Eval Volume · by Evaluator
spec.description: Which checks run most often

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by (evaluator) (increase(sigil_eval_executions_total{gen_ai_request_model=~"$model", gen_ai_request_provider=~"$provider", gen_ai_agent_name=~"$agent", evaluator_kind=~"$evaluator_kind"}[$__range])))

spec.title: AI Eval Results — Full Breakdown
